ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bandwidth_limits" (
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bandwidth limit */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service plan this limit applies to */,
  "bandwidth" TEXT /* Bandwidth limit for the service plan (e.g., 100 Mbps) */,
  "upload_bandwidth" TEXT /* Upload bandwidth limit for the service plan (e.g., 50 Mbps) */,
  "download_bandwidth" TEXT /* Download bandwidth limit for the service plan (e.g., 150 Mbps) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "multi_region_linkage" (
  "linkage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each multi-region linkage entry */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service plan this linkage applies to */,
  "supported_regions" TEXT /* Details about multi-region linkage support (e.g., number of regions supported) */,
  "region_count" INTEGER /* Number of regions supported */,
  "region_details" TEXT /* JSON array of supported regions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("linkage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clb_listeners" (
  "listener_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CLB listener entry */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service plan this listener count applies to */,
  "listener_count" INTEGER /* Number of CLB listeners available in the service plan */,
  "listener_type" TEXT /* Type of listener (e.g., HTTP, HTTPS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listener_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user managing service plans */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service plan being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the service plan */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, upgrade, downgrade) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service plan */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date and time the incident occurred */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of security incident (e.g., DDoS, SQL Injection) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_incidents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_incidents_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service plan */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., QPS, Response Time) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., ms, requests/sec) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_utilization" (
  "utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utilization record */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service plan */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "utilization_date" TEXT /* Date and time the utilization was recorded */,
  "cpu_usage" TEXT /* CPU usage percentage */,
  "memory_usage" TEXT /* Memory usage percentage */,
  "disk_usage" TEXT /* Disk usage percentage */,
  "network_usage" TEXT /* Network usage percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_utilization_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
